ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the test was conducted */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test type (e.g., pH, bacterial, chemical) */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail, inconclusive) */,
  "test_conducted_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or team who conducted the test */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test */,
  "test_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., pending, completed, reviewed) */,
  "test_methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "water_source" TEXT /* Type of water source (e.g., river, lake, well) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection or maintenance of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "test_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  "test_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the test should be conducted */,
  "test_criticality" TEXT /* Criticality level of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mrls" (
  "mrl_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each minimum reporting level */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test type */,
  "mrl_value" REAL /* Minimum reporting level value */,
  "mrl_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the minimum reporting level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mrl_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mrls_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hrms" (
  "hrms_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health risk limit */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test type */,
  "hrms_value" REAL /* Health risk limit value */,
  "hrms_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the health risk limit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hrms_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hrms_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the agency */,
  "agency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the agency */,
  "agency_address" TEXT /* Address of the agency */,
  "agency_website" TEXT /* Website of the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "equipment_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "equipment_model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "equipment_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "equipment_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the test result */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the result value */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., preliminary, final, corrected) */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the result */,
  "result_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., water quality analyst, laboratory technician, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position or title of the user */,
  "user_supervisor" TEXT /* Name of the user's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the test */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_equipment" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used for the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id", "equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_agencies" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency conducting the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id", "agency_id")
)
